title: Support 2D dynamic array initialization
body:
Example code (`temp.sv`):
```
function automatic void array_2d();
  bit myarray [][];
  myarray = new[3];
  foreach (myarray[i])
    myarray[i] = new[4];
endfunction
```
Command and error message:
```
$ verilator --lint-only temp.sv
%Error: temp.sv:6:18: dynamic new() not expected in this context (data type must be dynamic array)
    6 |     myarray[i] = new[4];
      |                  ^~~
%Error: Internal Error: temp.sv:6:16: ../V3Width.cpp:6251: Node has no type
    6 |     myarray[i] = new[4];
      |                ^
```
Verilator details (built from main):
```
commit b8417abee5f10c782315059da83caec582b17785
Thu Nov 16 2023

$ $VERILATOR_ROOT/bin/verilator --version           
Verilator 5.019 devel rev v5.018-44-gb8417abee

```
